_note: Label vocab + thresholds for scripts/lib/audio_sense.py (concepts/clip-forensics-research-2026-06). CLAP zero-shot scores each window against the `prompt` text and emits `label` when cosine >= clap_threshold. PANNs framewise emits any AudioSet class whose name contains a panns_keep substring (case-insensitive) above panns_threshold. Thresholds are STARTING DEFAULTS to calibrate on your own reference_clips/ — CLAP cosine is uncalibrated and runs LOW (verified: top labels ~0.26-0.32 on real clips), so 0.30 is a deliberately low floor; raise it (per-corpus) if you get noise. PANNs is opt-in (CLIP_AUDIO_SENSE_PANNS=1) because panns_inference stalls on torch>=2.9; CLAP covers the common classes via the music/laughter/cheering/quack prompts.

clap_labels.label: boom
clap_labels.prompt: a deep bass boom impact sound effect, vine boom

clap_labels.label: scratch
clap_labels.prompt: a vinyl record scratch sound effect

clap_labels.label: riser
clap_labels.prompt: a rising tension riser build-up sweep

clap_labels.label: boing
clap_labels.prompt: a cartoon boing spring sproing sound

clap_labels.label: sad_trombone
clap_labels.prompt: a sad trombone womp womp wah-wah fail sound

clap_labels.label: beep_censor
clap_labels.prompt: a censorship beep tone bleeping over speech

_panns_keep_note: Substrings matched against the 527 AudioSet class names panns_inference returns (case-insensitive). Kept small and generic so it survives exact-name drift across PANNs versions.
